nodes.label: RTP Receive Path
nodes.rationale: Network -> UDP -> RTP Receiver -> demux -> Jitter Buffer -> PCM Decode -> IMediaReceiver.

nodes.label: RTP Send Path
nodes.rationale: IMediaSender -> PCM Encode -> RTP Packetize -> SRTP Encrypt -> UDP -> Network.

nodes.label: SRTP Negotiation
nodes.rationale: SRTP encryption is negotiated during SDP offer/answer; the SDK automatically selects the strongest mutually supported crypto suite so no manual key management is required.

nodes.label: Adaptive Jitter Buffer
nodes.rationale: Smooths network packet reordering and delay variation; target delay adjusts automatically based on observed network conditions.

nodes.label: RTCP Reporting
nodes.rationale: Sender/Receiver Reports every 5 seconds; quality metrics (packet loss, jitter, round-trip time) exposed via call.GetRtcpQuality().
